title: Anthropic's Claude Tag: 60% Interact This Way! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Claude Tag, an Anthropic tool that 60% of users interact with, revealing its role in Anthropic's internal operations. The video emphasizes the feature's importance and widespread adoption within the organization.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Claude Tag, an Anthropic tool that the video says 60% of users interact with, and describes its role within Anthropic's internal operations. The emphasis is on the feature's importance and its widespread adoption inside the organization, framed around model interaction patterns and prompting. The summary offers no further specifics on how the tool works or how the 60% figure was measured.
